message.content:
I'll start by exploring the workspace structure to understand the prior constraints and current state. Let me check the episodes and evidence directories.```bash
find /tmp_workspace -type f -name "*.json" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "*.csv" -o -name "*.txt" 2>/dev/null | head -50
ls -la /tmp_workspace/
ls -la /tmp_workspace/episodes/ 2>/dev/null || echo "episodes dir not found"
ls -la /tmp_workspace/evidence/ 2>/dev/null || echo "evidence dir not found"
ls -la /tmp_workspace/results/ 2>/dev/null || mkdir -p /tmp_workspace/results && echo "created results dir"
```
message.reasoning_content:
